title: Financial Regulation Legislation in the US Congress
description: Legislation aimed at changing financial regulators' oversight of institutions with assets between $10 billion and $50 billion. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) would no longer oversee these institutions under proposed bills H.R. 3230 and S. 1582. Additionally, the Uniform Financial Institutions Rating System is being considered for changes through bill H.R. 3379.
